subject: Children
bill.title: Children - As introduced, revises various provisions governing surrendering custody of unwanted infants, including adding an ambulance station that has staff scheduled 24 hours a day to the list of facilities that must receive possession of a newborn infant left on the premises with an employee or member of the professional medical community if certain listed conditions are met.  - Amends TCA Title 36, Chapter 1, Part 1 and Title 68, Chapter 11, Part 2.
